hero_subheading: Write, format, and optimize your textual copy in seconds
seo_title: Free Text & Writing Tools Online - DevToolKit
seo_description: Free text utility tools including word counter, duplicate lines remover, case converter, and synonyms rewriter.
overview_text: Text tools help copywriters, developers, and students quickly clean up, rewrite, analyze, or format lists of text blocks. All operations are run securely in-browser.

faqs.question: Is my text data secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our text tools run entirely inside your browser's local sandbox; none of your text or files are uploaded to our servers.

faqs.question: How does the duplicate line remover work?
faqs.answer: Simply paste your list, click run, and it removes any duplicate row entries instantly.
